pip-compile.description: Manage the hash-pinned docs lock: read docs/requirements.txt's pip-compile header, bump deps in docs/requirements.in, and regenerate the lock with --generate-hashes.

packageRules.description: docs/requirements.txt is a hash-pinned pip-compile lock (generated from docs/requirements.in). The pip-compile manager updates the .in and regenerates the lock WITH hashes; pip_requirements must NOT touch the lock or it would bump a version without regenerating --hash lines, breaking the --require-hashes install. Keep it disabled for that file.
Docs toolchain (mkdocs-material + mkdocs-include-markdown-plugin + mike + transitive deps) bumps land in one PR via the pip-compile lock; chore(deps) keeps the conventional-title check happy.
